{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032315472559C443B08A753F41D881"}"},"total":15329},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6850377453664862208","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者文笔很好，内容也不枯燥（没有像某些系统文主角到处装逼，而是很自然那种），主角也没有乱收后宫（对于一个女生来说，主角当种马真的很不能接受，当然如果作者写的很好也OK的），总而言之，很期待之后的剧情，顺便等更"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1594977797,"group_id":"6841894552530324494","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"生吃个人，我很抱歉≥﹏≤","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0eAnC8H9tVEB1XJnC2N4UA=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/130fc9ec5bda494eac7b68ed94e60695~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795036&x-signature=ZlIwUW8cDjtzpMxahnEK8CPtIkk%3D","user_id":"804472920225261","user_name":"没钱恰饭了"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"804472920225261","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6841894552530324494","book_info":{"abstract":"秦易穿越到真武大世界，获得无上大氪金系统，从此开启无敌之路。
想要盖世修为，一拳崩掉一颗星球，打碎一个世界的力量？买！
想要圣地的绝代圣女当洗脚丫头，上界的盖世天骄当跟班小弟？买！
太古祖龙当座驾，诸天大佬当保镖，极道帝兵买来切菜，净世神水买来泡澡。
秦易：这个世界上，就没有我用钱摆不平的事儿，如果有，那就加钱。PS：强烈推荐十三玄幻暴爽新书：《开局签到天罡三十六变》

ker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6841894552530324494","book_info":{"abstract":"秦易穿越到真武大世界，获得无上大氪金系统，从此开启无敌之路。
